scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c red,blue "npm run dev -w server" "npx --yes wait-on@8.0.1 http-get://127.0.0.1:4000/api/health -t 60000 && npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build -w server && node scripts/prepare-vercel-api.mjs && npm install --omit=dev --prefix api && npm run build -w client
